            display: flex;
        }

            display: none;

            bottom: 6px;
            z-index: 9;

            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .hNetBox:hover .hoverBox{
            display: flex;
        }
        .hNetBox .hoverBox {
            display: none;
            position: absolute;
            /*left: 6px;*/
            right: 6px;
            width: 30px;
            top: 6px;
            /*bottom: 6px;*/
            z-index: 9;
            /*background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);*/
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9);
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        .hUpBox2 .hoverBox.hRemarkHoverBox{
            left: 0px;
            right: 0px;
            top: 0px;
            bottom: 0px;
        }
        .hUpBox2 .hoverBox img{
            width: 80px;
            padding: 20px 30px;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        .hHoverRemark {
            position: absolute;
            top: calc( 100% + 5px );
            z-index: 9999;
            right: 0;
            max-width: 352px;
            width:max-content;
            box-sizing:border-box;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);
            color: #FFFFFF;
            padding: 4px 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            display:none;
        }
        .hAbroadOrders3 .hOrderBox .hOrderContent .hReceiverPer {
            margin-bottom: 16px;
            display: flex;
        }

        .hAbroadOrders3 .hOrderBox .hOrderContent .hReceiverPer > div:first-child {
            width: 80px;
            text-align: right;
            color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }

        .hAbroadOrders3 .hOrderBox .hOrderContent .hReceiverPer > div:last-child {
            flex: 1;
            margin-left: 10px;
            color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.9);

        }
